rationale: The proposed change concerns Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. Educ. Code §11.162 governs school uniform requirements and is wholly unrelated; no overlap or conflict exists.
quote: The board of trustees of an independent school district may adopt rules that require students at a school in the district to wear school uniforms
_note: Rule text is about school uniforms and has no bearing on homestead exemption amounts.
